data.name: Settings_Section_Basic_Sub
data.value: Adjust manually when auto detection fails

data.name: Settings_Section_Shortcut_Sub
data.value: Press [Delete] to clear the selected shortcut

data.name: Settings_Shortcut_MouseThrough_Tooltip
data.value: Focus this box and press a shortcut (e.g. F6). Press Delete to clear.

data.name: Settings_Shortcut_ClearData_Tooltip
data.value: Focus this box and press a shortcut (e.g. F9). Press Delete to clear.

data.name: Settings_Section_Combat_Sub
data.value: [Clear data after combat] resets only the current data, not the total.

data.name: Settings_Display_MarqueeText_Tooltip
data.value: Enable automatic scrolling when a player name exceeds the available space.

data.name: Settings_Display_DpsMode_Tooltip
data.value: Choose how DPS is calculated: total damage divided by duration, or overall average DPS.

data.name: Settings_Display_DpsMode_Switch_Tooltip
data.value: On = total damage / duration, Off = overall average DPS (ValuePerSecond).

data.name: Settings_Display_TimeSeriesCapacity_Tooltip
data.value: Maximum number of data points stored for DPS/HPS/DTPS trend charts. Higher values show more history but use more memory. Range: 50-1000 samples.

data.name: Settings_PlayerNameMask_Warning_Message
data.value: Do not use data results to discriminate or harm the game community environment.

data.name: MainView_Plugin_DpsTool_Description
data.value: Provides DPS statistics and skill breakdown tools

data.name: MainView_Plugin_WorldBoss_Description
data.value: Crowdsourced live data for each channel's world boss status

data.name: MainView_Plugin_PigTracker_Description
data.value: Community-driven tracker for Pig Nabo routes and locations

data.name: ModuleSolve_TargetProperties_Title
data.value: Target stats and levels (0 = default) [type to search]

data.name: ModuleSolve_ExcludeProperties_Title
data.value: Exclude stats (conflicts with targets) [type to search]

data.name: ModuleSolve_UsingTip
data.value: After opening this window, change zone or relog before analyzing. Right-click a stat option to clear it.

data.name: Warning_UidNotConfigured
data.value: Tried to open personal training mode without UID configured

data.name: Settings_Shortcut_TopMost_Tooltip
data.value: Focus this box and press a shortcut (e.g. F9). Press Delete to clear.

data.name: Settings_NetworkAdapterAutoSelect_Failed
data.value: Network adapter auto select failed, please check you have proper network connections

data.name: Settings_CancelConfirm_Message
data.value: Discard all changes? Unsaved changes will be lost.

data.name: Settings_Combat_DpsUpdateMode_Tooltip
data.value:
Real Time: Event-driven updates
Timer Based: Timer-based periodic updates (low CPU usage, configurable refresh interval)

data.name: Settings_Combat_DpsUpdateInterval_Tooltip
data.value: Only effective in Active mode Recommended: 500-2000 milliseconds

data.name: Settings_Shortcut_ToggleDps_Tooltip
data.value: Focus this box and press a shortcut (e.g. F10). Press Delete to clear.

data.name: Settings_Section_Character_Sub
data.value: Set your character UID for Solo/Training mode

data.name: Settings_Character_Uid_Tooltip
data.value: Enter your character UID (number) How to get: After a fight, your character will automatically appear in the stats window

data.name: Settings_Combat_MaxHistoryCount_Tooltip
data.value: Maximum number of battle records to keep (5-50)

data.name: Settings_PlayerInfo_FormatString_Tooltip
data.value: Advanced: Directly edit the format string using placeholders like {Name}, {Spec}, {PowerLevel}, etc.

data.name: Settings_PlayerInfo_Clear_Tooltip
data.value: Clear the format string and start fresh

data.name: About_Intro_Primary
data.value: A combat data analytics tool built for BPSR players.

data.name: About_Intro_Details
data.value: This tool requires no client modifications and stays within the game's terms of service. It helps players understand combat data, reduce unnecessary effort, and improve the gameplay experience. Please do not use the results for power discrimination or any behaviour that harms the community.

data.name: About_Developers_Label
data.value: Contributors for this release (in no particular order):

data.name: About_OpenSource_Prefix
data.value: This project is open source at

data.name: About_OpenSource_Suffix
data.value: , If you encounter any issues, please open an issue there.

data.name: About_Contribution
data.value: To contribute, please fork the repository and submit a pull request.

data.name: About_Community_Invite
data.value: If you cannot access GitHub or want to find teammates, join the Tencent QQ groups:

data.name: About_Thanks_Suffix
data.value: for supporting and inspiring this project.

data.name: About_PoweredBy
data.value: Powered by .NET 8, Licensed under the GNU AGPL v3.

data.name: DamageReference_Disclaimer
data.value: Data is for entertainment and reference only. Do not use it for power discrimination or any behaviour that harms the community; violations will result in permanent revocation.

data.name: Debug_Filter_Tooltip
data.value: Filter logs by message or category content

data.name: Common_SkillDisplayLimitSaved
data.value: Skill display limit saved to config:

data.name: Common_SkillListRefreshed
data.value: Skill list refreshed for all slots

data.name: Dialog_UidRequired_Message
data.value:
Please configure your character UID in Settings before using personal training mode.
How to get UID: in game, the bottom-left player number is your UID.

data.name: App_RestartAsAdmin_Message
data.value:
Some features may require administrator privileges.
Would you like to restart the application as administrator?

data.name: App_AlreadyAdmin_Message
data.value: This application is already running with administrator privileges.

data.name: Dialog_UidRequired_Message2
data.value:
Please configure your character UID in Settings before using skill log.
How to get UID: in game, the bottom-left player number is your UID.

data.name: Update_Available_Message
Update_NoUpdate_Message
data.value: You are already using the latest version.

data.name: Settings_Section_Update_Sub
data.value: Manually check for a newer version.

data.name: Settings_Update_Check_Tooltip
data.value: Check GitHub or self-host update source now.

data.name: Settings_UID_Setting_Message1
data.value: No current player UID captured. Please change map and try again.

data.name: Settings_UID_Setting_Message2
data.value: You are trying to set UID for current player. This data may not be accurate, please verify on your own.

data.name: Settings_CustomFormat_Message
data.value: Custom format is disabled. Using default visibility settings.
